description: One outcome dimension's Bayesian posterior under a GoldenProcessParameters head — Achse 1 of the two-axis Golden model. Default dimensions: output (cycle-time, OEE-input), energy (kWh/part), scrap, cpk, tool_life, stability (sigma within lot) + customer-specific (dimension=custom, metric_name set). Each dimension is estimated SEPARATELY so trade-offs between modes are visible (Konzept §16.1, §16.2). Every quantitative view reads mean as expected_real alongside the planned value, with ci_low/ci_high as the confidence interval (Golden-First, §5).

attributes.name: dimension
attributes.description: Outcome dimension; 'custom' carries a customer-specific metric via metric_name

attributes.name: metric_name
attributes.description: Concrete metric name for custom dimensions (e.g. compliance_depth)

attributes.name: sigma
attributes.description: Posterior standard deviation — the drift-detection unit

attributes.name: unit
attributes.description: Unit of the metric (e.g. kWh/part, %, ratio)

attributes.name: posterior
attributes.description: Full posterior params (distribution family + hyperparameters) for resumable Bayesian update
